description: Fix non-null assertion crash in PATCH handler and align Medication type for last_reminded_at field.
steps: In app/api/medications/[id]/route.ts, add a null check after updateMedication() call and return 404 if updated is undefined, removing the non-null assertions.
In lib/types.ts, change last_reminded_at from optional (?) to required (string | null) to match the runtime invariant.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH handler returns 404 if updateMedication returns undefined instead of crashing with non-null assertions
Medication interface has last_reminded_at: string | null (required, not optional)
findings: Both fixes applied cleanly. Build and lint pass. No other files needed changes since the Medication type with required last_reminded_at is compatible with all existing usage (createMedication always sets it to null).
